data.title: Binance Introduces Pre-TGE Prime Sale Edition for Enhanced Project Access
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the Binance Wallet is launching a new Pre-Token Generation Event (Pre-TGE) Prime Sale edition. This initiative aims to provide users with early access to more mature projects that have demonstrated a higher level of development. Traditionally, acquiring tokens from such projects before their Token Generation Event (TGE) has been less accessible to most users. The Pre-TGE Prime Sale edition builds on the existing Binance Wallet Pre-TGE experience, focusing on expanding access to these advanced projects. The first project utilizing this model is expected to be announced on 2025-10-10 at 13:30 (UTC) via the official Binance Wallet X account.

The Pre-TGE Prime Sale edition operates similarly to previous Pre-TGEs on Binance Wallet. During the Prime Sale, users can subscribe to project tokens exclusively within the Binance Wallet. The subscription process follows an over-subscription model, allowing deposits up to a specified amount of BNB per user. Token allocation is proportional to the total BNB deposited by all participants. After the subscription period ends, users can claim their allocated tokens, which will be credited to their accounts but remain non-tradeable until the official launch date, as announced by the project. Any excess BNB will be automatically refunded.

The Pre-TGE Prime Sale offers several benefits, including access to more mature projects, broader project access, a verified user base, larger sale amounts, and fair distribution through transparent allocation mechanisms. The sale process is divided into three phases: BNB Deposit Subscription, Token Allocation (Non-Tradable), and Trading Opens on Binance Alpha. Some sales may incorporate Prime Sale Keys, which serve as proof of successful subscription. These keys are non-tradable and have no monetary value. Users are encouraged to conduct their own research and review the Terms of Use and Risk Warning before participating.

data.title: Binance Wallet Launches Pre-TGE Prime Sale Edition to Expand Access to Mature Blockchain Projects
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance Wallet has introduced a new Pre-Token Generation Event (Pre-TGE) Prime Sale Edition, offering early access to more mature blockchain projects ahead of their token generation.The first project under this model will be announced on October 10, 2025, at 13:30 UTC on the official Binance Wallet X account.The Pre-TGE Prime Sale maintains Binance’s over-subscription model using BNB deposits, ensuring fair allocation and transparent participation.Key benefits include greater accessibility, verified participation, and larger sale sizes, designed to connect advanced projects with Binance’s global user base.Binance Wallet Unveils Pre-TGE Prime Sale EditionBinance Wallet announced the launch of its new Pre-Token Generation Event (Pre-TGE) Prime Sale Edition, a next-generation format that allows users to gain early access to more advanced blockchain projects before their official token generation event (TGE).Unlike traditional Pre-TGE offerings, the Prime Sale Edition focuses on projects that have demonstrated higher levels of maturity and development, bridging the gap between institutional-grade opportunities and retail accessibility.The first featured project under this new model will be revealed on October 10, 2025, at 13:30 UTC through Binance Wallet’s official X (formerly Twitter) account.How the Pre-TGE Prime Sale Edition WorksThe Pre-TGE Prime Sale mechanism follows a structure similar to Binance Wallet’s previous Pre-TGE launches:Subscription Phase:Eligible users can subscribe using BNB within Binance Wallet during the deposit period. The event follows an over-subscription model, where allocation is proportional to each user’s BNB deposit relative to total participation.Allocation Phase:Once the subscription closes, users can claim their allocated tokens via the [Assets] tab. These tokens are non-tradable until the project’s official TGE, and any unused BNB is automatically refunded.Trading Phase:After launch, the tokens become tradable on Binance Alpha, enabling participants to engage in open market trading.Some campaigns may also introduce Prime Sale Keys, stored in the user’s wallet as proof of successful participation. These keys are non-transferable and hold no monetary value.Benefits of the Pre-TGE Prime SaleAccess to Mature Projects: Participants gain early entry to well-developed blockchain projects that have traditionally been exclusive to private investors.Verified User Participation: The program connects vetted Binance Wallet users with legitimate projects to foster genuine ecosystem engagement.Fair and Transparent Distribution: The over-subscription model ensures proportional allocation and transparent fund handling.Larger Sale Opportunities: The Prime Sale model enables higher allocation limits and broader participation.Seamless Integration with Binance Alpha: Users can trade their allocations as soon as the project’s token officially lists.Expanding Access to Institutional-Grade ProjectsThe Pre-TGE Prime Sale Edition strengthens Binance Wallet’s position as a gateway for early-stage token participation, particularly as Web3 projects mature and seek regulated, high-quality distribution platforms.By focusing on accessibility, transparency, and verified user engagement, Binance Wallet aims to make institutional-grade opportunities available to a global audience.

data.title: The 6.3 million STRKs Vitalik received were transferred to the address associated with the non-profit organization Methuselah Foundation five minutes ago.
data.description: The 6.3 million STRK (approximately $1.09 million) previously received by Vitalik was transferred five minutes ago to an address associated with the Methuselah Foundation, a non-profit volunteer organization dedicated to extending human life.

data.title: Ancient Bitcoin Whale Increases Short Position
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a prominent Bitcoin whale, known for its significant Ethereum trades, has expanded its short position on Bitcoin. The whale has increased leverage from 8x to 10x, currently holding a short position of 6,188.7 BTC, valued at $750 million. The position is currently experiencing an unrealized loss of $3.46 million, with a liquidation price set at $130,810.

data.title: Ethereum Developers Prepare for Fusaka and Glamsterdam Upgrades
data.description: According to PANews, the 222nd Ethereum Execution Layer Core Developers Meeting, summarized by Christine Kim, revealed that developers have initiated a shadow fork of the Sepolia testnet in preparation for the Fusaka upgrade, which is still scheduled for October 14. The meeting also focused on the subsequent major network upgrade, codenamed Glamsterdam. Developers outlined three key changes for Glamsterdam: 1. Block-level access lists (EIP 7928), with a multi-client testnet expected to launch next week; 2. Gas pricing reforms, including a storage tax mechanism (EIP 8032) aimed at curbing state growth through dynamic pricing; 3. A new opcode (EIP 7791) to support direct conversion of Gas to ETH. Additionally, the proposal deadline for Glamsterdam is set for one week after the Fusaka mainnet date is confirmed. The Holesky testnet is confirmed to be deprecated by the end of this month.

data.title: OKX will launch ZORAUSDT perpetual contracts
data.description: According to an official announcement, OKX will officially launch ZORAUSDT perpetual contracts on its website, app, and API at 7:30 PM (UTC+8) on October 10, 2025. Zora is a blockchain-based social network where every post can be converted into tradable tokens, and creators can earn rewards through trading these tokens.

data.title: The Base Layer Identity Crisis: Why L2 Growth Actually Proves Ethereum's Value
data.description:
Base pays $6,400 daily to Ethereum validators. This buys access to $140+ billion in security—over $60,000 in value for every dollar paid. The problem isn't technical. It's that these value flows stay hidden. L2 success proves Ethereum's design works, but users can't see it.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/10/10/the-base-layer-identity-crisis-why-l2-growth-actually-proves-ethereums-value/

data.title: Gold Mining Stocks Surge Amid Rising Gold Prices
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the standout performer in the U.S. stock market this year has been the gold mining sector, rather than AI or Bitcoin-related stocks. With gold prices soaring by 52% since January and recently surpassing $4,000 per ounce, gold mining stocks have experienced a remarkable rally. The S&P Global Gold Mining Index has surged by 129% this year, significantly outperforming technology stocks and cryptocurrencies. Major companies like Newmont and Barrick have seen their stock prices double, emerging as the biggest winners in the market.

The success of gold mining stocks is attributed to the profit leverage effect brought about by rising gold prices. For gold mining companies, fixed costs remain unchanged, and the additional revenue from higher gold prices can almost entirely translate into pure profit, resulting in abundant cash flow. However, seasoned investors remain cautious about the potential recurrence of the 2011 gold bubble, expressing concerns over excessive mergers and acquisitions and inflated executive compensation.

Analysts from BiyaPay highlight that the success of the gold mining industry reaffirms the investment logic of 'value return,' especially amid increasing global economic uncertainty. The demand for gold as a safe-haven asset continues to rise. BiyaPay, a platform supporting zero-fee digital currency and USDT trading for U.S. and Hong Kong stock investments, not only offers gold futures trading but also assists investors in efficiently managing diversified asset portfolios globally. As gold mining stocks and traditional assets experience a resurgence, BiyaPay aims to provide users with more financial investment opportunities, helping them achieve wealth growth in a complex market environment.

data.title: Greeks.live: The English community is strongly bullish on BTC, and ETH staking dynamics are causing significant systemic risks
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, released a briefing stating that the Greeks.live English community has shown a clear bullish stance on BTC, with strong confidence in the $122,000 support level. Most traders are actively selling put options, anticipating a new all-time high. Furthermore, the ETH market is experiencing significant systemic risk due to staking dynamics. The unstaked queue has exceeded $10 billion, with wait times exceeding 41 days, while exchange liquidity has fallen to a historic low of 2.83 million ETH. Staking ETH ETFs face a potential liquidity mismatch between traditional financial settlement cycles and ETH unstacking timeframes. Furthermore, DATCO removes over 400,000 ETH from circulation each month, creating significant scarcity and potentially driving ETH's realized volatility higher relative to BTC.
